title: New York, New York
why_this_song: New York, New York by Frank Sinatra (1980) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 13 times; first heard in: "New York, New York"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Start spreading the news"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "I want to be a part of it"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "These vagabond shoes"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "I'll make a brand new start of it"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "york" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "york" na música inteira?

excerpts.text: If I can make it there

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Frank Sinatra one question about "New York, New York", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Frank Sinatra sobre "New York, New York", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "New York, New York" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "New York, New York" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "New York, New York" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "New York, New York" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
